title: Dekton Steel U-Lock | Ultra Strong & Durable | Weather & Scratch Resistant |Quick Release Bracket| Includes 2 Keys | Ideal for Bikes, Scooters & Motorbikes | Secure Your Ride with Confidence
features: Ultra Strong & Durable Construction: The Dekton Steel U-Lock is designed with a heavy-duty steel cable for maximum strength, providing reliable protection for your bike, scooter, or motorbike against theft.

Weatherproof & Scratch-Resistant Design: The bike lock is equipped with a durable, weatherproof coating that shields the cable from rust and corrosion. Additionally, the scratch-resistant exterior ensures that your bike’s frame remains protected from cosmetic damage during use.

Includes 2 Durable Steel Keys: For ease of use, this lock comes with two steel keys, offering backup security in case one is misplaced. The spare key allows for shared access or keeps you covered if one is lost.

Quick Release Bracket for Easy Access: Equipped with a quick-release mounting bracket, this U-Lock attaches easily to your bike frame for fast access and convenient storage while you ride. The bracket keeps the lock secure and easily accessible when needed.

Versatile for Bikes, Scooters & Motorbikes: This lock is ideal for securing a variety of vehicles including bicycles, scooters, and motorbikes. It’s perfect for everyday commuting, travel, or simply protecting your ride while it’s parked. Reliable security, wherever you go.
description: The Dekton Bike Lock is engineered to provide maximum security and durability for your bike, scooter, or motorbike. Built with a heavy-duty steel cable, it delivers exceptional protection against theft, ensuring your vehicle stays secure in any environment. The weatherproof and scratch-resistant coating adds an extra layer of durability, making it resistant to rust, corrosion, and damage while keeping your bike's finish intact. Equipped with a quick-release mounting bracket, this U-Lock attaches easily to your bike frame for fast access and convenient storage while you ride. The lock includes two durable steel keys, giving you a backup key for added peace of mind or sharing. Ideal for a wide range of vehicles including bicycles, scooters, and motorbikes, this versatile lock offers reliable security whether you're commuting, traveling, or parking. Trust the Dekton Bike Lock to safeguard your ride with confidence wherever you go.
